The Birthday Gazette
June 27, 2026 Price: one slice of cake Special Edition
Breaking  ·  Confirmed  ·  Absolutely Undeniable
Today's top story

It's Saanvi
Sah's day.

Sources close to the birthday girl confirm this is, in fact, happening — and that she is handling it with her usual grace and suspicious calm.

Reported by: everyone who loves her
The facts

Another year has passed. Saanvi has, by all accounts, only gotten better. Experts are baffled. Cake has been sourced from a reliable location. Celebrations are underway and expected to continue indefinitely, or until the snacks run out — whichever comes last.

What we know

She is, without question, one of a kind. The evidence is overwhelming and has been thoroughly reviewed. Those present at the scene report that simply being around her improves the general quality of any given day by a measurable and significant margin.

What happens next

Forecasts indicate a high chance of laughter, a strong likelihood of something delicious, and zero possibility of an ordinary day. Meteorologists have no explanation. They are simply recommending you enjoy it.

"She makes the whole room a little warmer just by being in it."

— The Official Birthday Record, page 1

98.4%

CBSE Class 12 Board Examinations.
School Topper. The name at the very top.

Reported by: everyone who loves her
What this means

This isn't just a number. This is proof that she decided who she wanted to be and then became her. Quietly, determinedly, without fuss. That is rarer than any score.

“I am so genuinely proud of you, Saanvi — and I mean that in the way that makes me want to tell everyone.”

— written with full sincerity

You inspire me — not in the motivational-poster way, but in the real way, where I look at what you did and think: okay, so it actually is possible. Happy birthday to the school topper. You earned every bit of it.
